name: Omnisend API
what_it_does: Omnisend — e-commerce-focused email, SMS, and push notification marketing automation platform with a REST API for managing contacts, sending campaigns, and automating lifecycle messaging.
use_cases: Agents triggering personalized transactional emails and SMS via Omnisend's API when order events occur
Contact management automation — agents syncing customer data and custom properties from CRM to Omnisend in real time
Cart abandonment workflows — agents triggering Omnisend automation sequences when cart abandonment events are detected
Segmentation management — agents creating and updating contact segments based on purchase behavior for targeted campaigns
Campaign performance analytics — agents querying Omnisend for open rates, click rates, and revenue attribution per campaign
not_for: Non-e-commerce email marketing — Omnisend is optimized for online stores; use Mailchimp or ConvertKit for content/creator marketing
Transactional infrastructure email — use SendGrid or Postmark for high-volume transactional email at scale
B2B enterprise marketing automation — HubSpot or Marketo are better for complex B2B sales cycles
best_when: Your agent manages an e-commerce store and needs integrated email + SMS + push marketing automation with strong Shopify/WooCommerce integration.
avoid_when: You're not in e-commerce or need enterprise B2B marketing automation — use Mailchimp, HubSpot, or ConvertKit.

auth.notes: API key from Omnisend account settings. Passed in X-API-KEY header. Account-wide key — no scope granularity. Separate keys per Omnisend account (brand).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 500 contacts, 500 emails/month, unlimited web push
pricing.paid_tiers: Standard: $16/month (500 contacts) — scales with list size; Pro: adds SMS and advanced features
pricing.notes: Contact-count based pricing. E-commerce focused — strong value for online stores. Competitive with Klaviyo on pricing. SMS is included in Pro and above.

performance.rate_limits: REST API: 400 req/min; contact sync: batch up to 100 contacts per request

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with adequate documentation. Error responses include HTTP status and message. Batch operation errors return partial success with error details per item.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contact upsert by email is idempotent. Campaign sending is not idempotent — duplicate sends possible if called twice. Segment creation is idempotent with same name.
known_agent_gotchas: Domain authentication (DKIM/SPF) must be configured before sending or emails land in spam
Contact unsubscribes are permanent — agents must not re-subscribe contacts via API without explicit consent
Campaign send is async — API returns immediately; delivery status available via webhook only
SMS requires phone number validation and country-specific opt-in compliance — not plug-and-play globally
Contact batch sync limit (100/request) means large list imports require multiple API calls with rate limit consideration

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR compliant. EU data processing available. TLS enforced. API key with no scope granularity. No SOC2 documentation. GDPR tools for unsubscribe management.
